nodes.label: AI as time-saving content generation tool
nodes.label_negative: Manual content creation requiring staging and recording
nodes.grounding_span: I save time not having to stage and record my own videos/take my own photos

nodes.label: AI as strategic analytics assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI unable to provide actionable analytics
nodes.grounding_span: it would be able to tell me the optimum time to post content, which content to post, who to target

nodes.label: AI as creative brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: I had a conversation with a chatbot and we bounced ideas back and forth

nodes.label: Human-written captions for authentic voice
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated text that stands out as artificial
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write my own captions and comments, I feel that whenever I use an AI generated piece of text it stands out like a sore thumb

nodes.label: AI-generated image realism
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated images looking artificial or anachronistic
nodes.grounding_span: I often have trouble getting the generated images to look realistic, they often look like a picture instead of a photo

nodes.label: AI as low-cost startup enabler
nodes.label_negative: High-cost traditional content creation requiring equipment
nodes.grounding_span: It also allows for a low cost startup. You may need to purchase a subscription, but you don't need to purchase a high quality camera, studio space, props

nodes.label: AI as creative assistant across devices
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to single-device tasks
nodes.grounding_span: a personal AI account will be like an assistant. So it's on my phone, smart watch, PC

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I save time not having to stage and record my own videos

nodes.label: Profitability and business growth
nodes.grounding_span: make it quicker and, therefore, more profitable

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human touch
nodes.grounding_span: I think I can hook people more efficiently with that human-touch

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I had an A4 page of ideas that will last me weeks

nodes.label: Value and recognition of content creators
nodes.grounding_span: it would somewhat decrease the value of what content creators do

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for content generation
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me massively because I save time

nodes.label: Frustration with AI analytics limitations
nodes.grounding_span: At present I have not found a model that can do this for me

nodes.label: Frustration with AI image generation inaccuracies
nodes.grounding_span: the model was constantly adding wall-mounted televisions or other modern references

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I had an A4 page of ideas that will last me weeks

nodes.label: Resistance to AI replacing human creativity entirely
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I support that

nodes.label: Pragmatic boundary-setting between AI and human tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write my own captions and comments

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I often need to parrot their idea back to them with some specifics
